title: cynosurus geniculatus
intro: Cynosurus geniculatus, also known as Bristle Bent or Cynosure, is a type of flowering grass native to Europe, North Africa, and Western Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects, making it useful in treating urinary issues and skin conditions. The health benefits of Cynosurus geniculatus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Cynosurus geniculatus typically involve infusions of the plant's leaves and flowers, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or topical applications.
